_comment: Search index for site-wide search. Each entry: {title, snippet, url, kind}. Keep snippets short — they're shown in result rows. Hand-maintained; small enough to be fine.

entries.title: Home
entries.snippet: Hero, news, social profiles.

entries.title: Publications
entries.snippet: Search 400+ entries by title, author, venue, year. Filter by type.

entries.snippet: Education, positions, teaching, grants, awards, memberships, activities.

entries.snippet: ML-Ask, CAO, SPEC, POST-AL, YACIS, cyberbullying detection.

entries.title: Demos & releases
entries.snippet: Live demos, datasets, code releases.

entries.title: Photos
entries.snippet: Conference and lab photos by year.

entries.title: Contact
entries.snippet: Office address, email, phone — at Kitami Institute of Technology.

entries.title: ML-Ask · Affect Analysis System
entries.snippet: Keyword-based affect annotation for Japanese — emotemes, emotive expressions, Russell's 2D affect space.

entries.title: CAO · Emoticon Analysis System
entries.snippet: 10,000+ Japanese kaomoji decomposed into eyes, mouth, framing — re-assembled into emotion.

entries.title: Cyberbullying detection
entries.snippet: From SVM to a patented PMI-IR method on real-world Japanese cyberbullying data.

entries.title: YACIS · Japanese blog corpus
entries.snippet: 5.6 billion words of Japanese blog text — annotated with ML-Ask + CAO.

entries.title: SPEC · Sentence Pattern Extraction
entries.snippet: Language-independent extraction of n-element ordered combinations.

entries.title: POST-AL · Ainu POS tagger
entries.snippet: POS tagging and NLP for the critically endangered Ainu language.

entries.title: Contextual appropriateness of emotions
entries.snippet: Not just what emotion was expressed — was it appropriate for the context?

entries.title: Automatic evaluation of conversational agents
entries.snippet: Affect-based auto-rating of Japanese chatbots.

entries.title: ML-Ask online
entries.snippet: Streamlit demo — paste Japanese, get emotion analysis + Russell-2D mapping.

entries.title: qWALS — cross-lingual transfer
entries.snippet: Predict transfer-learning performance from typological distance (WALS-based).

entries.title: POST-AL · Ainu POS tagger (browser)
entries.snippet: In-browser POS tagger for Ainu — paste text, see analysis.

entries.title: ML-Ask emotion lexicon (v2024)
entries.snippet: Japanese emotive-expression database — ~2,100 entries, 10 emotion types.

entries.title: CAO emoticon database
entries.snippet: All unique kaomoji used in CAO, with eye/mouth decomposition and frequencies.

entries.title: Hugging Face profile
entries.snippet: Models and Spaces — Japanese emotion-aware models, YACIS-derived LMs.

entries.title: Research interests
entries.snippet: Affect analysis, NLP, cyberbullying detection, affective computing, Ainu language.

entries.snippet: Ph.D. Hokkaido University 2010, M.A. Adam Mickiewicz University 2006.
